ddls:
CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise owner */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the franchise belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the franchise */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the franchise logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchises_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the franchise the team belongs to */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Points earned by the team */,
  "potential_points" REAL /* Potential points that could have been earned by the team */,
  "cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster the team is part of */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "pc1" REAL /* Principal component 1 */,
  "pc2" REAL /* Principal component 2 */,
  "pc3" REAL /* Principal component 3 */,
  "pc4" REAL /* Principal component 4 */,
  "pc5" REAL /* Principal component 5 */,
  "pc6" REAL /* Principal component 6 */,
  "pc7" REAL /* Principal component 7 */,
  "pc8" REAL /* Principal component 8 */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "head_to_head" (
  "h2h_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each head-to-head matchup */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the matchup */,
  "h2h_wins" INTEGER /* Number of head-to-head wins */,
  "h2h_losses" INTEGER /* Number of head-to-head losses */,
  "h2h_ties" INTEGER /* Number of head-to-head ties */,
  "h2h_winpct" REAL /* Head-to-head win percentage */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("h2h_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_head_to_head_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_play" (
  "allplay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each all-play result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the result */,
  "allplay_wins" INTEGER /* Number of all-play wins */,
  "allplay_losses" INTEGER /* Number of all-play losses */,
  "allplay_ties" INTEGER /* Number of all-play ties */,
  "allplay_winpct" REAL /* All-play win percentage */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allplay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_all_play_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., league administrator, team owner, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league setting */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the setting applies to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the league setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the league setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_settings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the season applies to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the roster applies to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the roster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
